fields.title: Reproduce tau memory tool failure
fields.description: User reports the memory tool appears broken. First reproduce by invoking the current memory tool path, then isolate whether the issue is the harness memory tool or tau's extension memory registration/runtime.
fields.notes: Corrected behavior per user guidance: the memory prompt snapshot must stay frozen during an active session and only refresh on session_start, otherwise prompt caching is invalidated and memory-heavy sessions become expensive. I reverted the speculative snapshot-refresh change and kept runtime coverage instead: tests now verify (1) memory execute + tool_result handlers return promptly, (2) saved memory is not injected on subsequent before_agent_start calls within the same active session, and (3) a later session_start reload makes the new memory visible. I still could not reproduce the reported 20-minute post-tool hang in tau's execute/tool_result/context path; oracle analysis points more strongly to provider/model continuation after the tool result, with tau sandbox/context as the next local suspect if we need to instrument further.
